lines: The confession screen faces the short path between the writ chapel and Father Odran's private tent.
A scratched price table runs down one post. Someone crossed out the numbers, then wrote them again smaller.

showBriefing.title: AFTER LAST BELL
pages: At 23:00 the camp folds itself into low voices and lamp smoke. The bell clerk sleeps with one hand near the rope.
Widow Bruna comes from the wash tubs with a basket under one arm. She pauses by Father Odran's private tent, looks once toward the road, and slips inside.
No cry follows. No struggle. Only canvas moving in the night wind, and the little lamp inside left burning too long.
